topStories.description: Eyewitnesses have described the moment Air Canada flight AC8646 crashed into a fire truck on the runway of New York's LaGuardia airport.

topStories.title: Supreme Court unhappy over CBI, ED ‘reluctance’ against Anil Ambani firms, calls for ‘fair, dispassionate’ investigation
topStories.description: The Supreme Court today called on the CBI and ED to conduct a “fair, dispassionate, transparent, and time-bound” investigation into a banking fraud linked to the Anil Dhirubhai Ambani Group. The apex court also directed concerned financial institutions to “render full cooperation”.

topStories.title: EAM Jaishankar speaks with US' secretary Rubio on West Asia conflict
topStories.description: Jaishankar and Rubio discussed West Asia conflict and its impact on the global economy, with a focus on energy security concerns

topStories.title: BJP, Congress spar over fuel prices as Lok Sabha debates Finance Bill
topStories.description: The ruling party said that the government’s efforts to secure diversified energy sources should be appreciated

topStories.title: JFK, Atlanta airports issue travel advisory amid TSA worker shortage; passengers can expect five-hour wait time
topStories.description: Two of the US' busiest airports issued a travel advisory on Monday, warning passengers that the wait time could be at least five hours as TSA workers resign amid a partial DHS shutdown. Atlanta Airport, the world's busiest, saw wait time stretching beyond three hours over the weekend.

topStories.title: How Israel is reacting to Trump’s  ‘de-escalation’ with Iran
topStories.description: There is expected to be pushback from Israel following President Donald Trump’s move towards de-escalation with Iran.

topStories.title: Joe Kent praises Trump, says ‘President working to get peace with Iran, Israel will be against it, but…’
topStories.description: Kent, who is also former counterterrorism official in the Trump administration, said the President was working to make peace with Iran, while once again acknowledging resistance from Israel.

topStories.title: ‘I Messed Up’: Harrowing Final Moments in Fatal LaGuardia Crash
topStories.description: Air-traffic controllers were helping a fire truck’s crew navigate a rain-slicked tarmac at New York’s LaGuardia before midnight on Sunday when panic suddenly set in.

topStories.title: "Congress Destroyed Minorities": Badruddin Ajmal Eyes Assam Comeback
topStories.description: The AIUDF filed his nomination papers from the newly formed Binnakandi Assembly constituency seat amid a huge gathering. This will be Ajmal's return to state-level electoral politics after two...

dailyNews.title: Bipartisan bill seeks to ban sports betting on Kalshi and Polymarket
dailyNews.description: Since FanDuel and DraftKings are subject to state-by-state gambling laws, rather than federal law, they would not be impacted by the bill.

dailyNews.title: DoorDash introduces relief payments for drivers as the Iran-US war drives up gas prices
dailyNews.description: Gas is one of the largest expenses for delivery drivers. With prices continuing to surge, DoorDash is offering a lifeline to Dashers with a new relief program.

dailyNews.description: Jury ruling spotlights workplace accommodation gaps as remote work norms evolve in post-pandemic US.

dailyNews.title: Iran Parliament speaker denies talks with US after Trump claims ‘major points of agreement’
dailyNews.description: The statement directly contradicts claims made by Donald Trump, who earlier said Washington had engaged in talks with Tehran.

dailyNews.description: Restaurants across the country have been dealing with rising LPG costs, which directly impact their daily operations.

dailyNews.title: 'Fake News To Manipulate Oil, Stock Markets': Iran's Trashes Trump's Talks Claim
dailyNews.description: US President Donald Trump has claimed thatthe US and Iran could reach a deal in five days or sooner andIran wants to make a deal badly.

dailyNews.title: Nikhil Kamath teases next podcast with Rishi Sunak, wife Akshata Murty; internet asks, ‘Will the next be Trump and…?’
dailyNews.description: Nikhil Kamath engages in a candid conversation, touching on themes of marriage, companionship, and emotional dependence.

dailyNews.title: Trump urges ICE agents to avoid masks during airport deployment amid shutdown standoff
dailyNews.description: As the US Department of Homeland Security funding lapse disrupts airport operations, long queues and delays have intensified across major hubs.

dailyNews.title: India's first reaction after Trump pauses US attack on Iran's energy sites: ‘Keeping a focused watch’
dailyNews.description: Addressing an inter-ministerial briefing on the recent development in West Asia, MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal said that the ministry is focusing on such activities as the situation evolves amid the conflict.

dailyNews.title: US' and Iran's options for ending war narrow the longer it goes on
dailyNews.description: Iran shows no sign of climbdown, while air power alone cannot achieve the US' main goal.

dailyNews.title: TSA crisis at US airports: ICE agents step in during shutdown, but delays continue
dailyNews.description: While ICE agents have been deployed to support basic tasks, travelers continue to face long waits and confusion, especially at busy hubs like Hartsfield-Jackson Atlanta International Airport.

dailyNews.title: Trump deploys ICE agents to US airports amid staffing issues, delays
dailyNews.description: Democrats and other observers slam deployment of US immigration agents to airports as dangerous and source of tension.

dailyNews.title: Trump signals off-ramp in Iran war despite no ‘regime change’
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump has ordered the US military to postpone strikes against Iranian power plants and energy.

dailyNews.title: Obama intel chief angered president at meeting by asking if he'd tolerate Iran having nuclear weapon
dailyNews.description: Newly released oral histories revealed that former DNI Dennis Blair confronted President Obama over Iran’s nuclear policy and was later sidelined.

dailyNews.title: Former Biden spox complains easy Trump press access influences 'giddy' reporters
dailyNews.description: Former Biden press secretary Jen Psaki gave drawbacks to reporters' easy access to President Donald Trump during her recent "Pod Save America" appearance.

dailyNews.title: Trump delays Xi meeting as Iran conflict lets US strong-arm China’s oil supply
dailyNews.description: The Iran conflict is disrupting oil flows China relies on as Trump delays a planned Xi meeting, raising new questions about leverage and the broader U.S.–China relationship.

dailyNews.title: Judge blocks Trump from deporting Abrego Garcia to Liberia, extending legal standoff
dailyNews.description: The judge's order order halts Trump officials from deporting Abrego Garcia to Liberia — extending a high-stakes, 12-month court fight over the status of one migrant.

dailyNews.title: Mask-free ICE agents begin patrolling US airports; Trump floats National Guard
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump said ICE agents helping at airports with TSA lines should not wear masks, adding he may call in the National Guard if airport chaos continues.

dailyNews.title: When Voters Worry About ‘Affordability,’ Many Point to Health Care
dailyNews.description: Democrats have had limited political success running on the Affordable Care Act, even with its relative popularity. Now President Trump’s health care cuts may have given the issue new resonance.

dailyNews.title: How Obama’s Strategist Discouraged Biden From Running in 2016
dailyNews.description: In a new set of oral histories, David Plouffe, President Barack Obama’s political adviser, described how he urged Vice President Joseph R. Biden Jr. not to challenge Hillary Clinton for the nomination.

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Energy Strikes, but Iran’s Infrastructure is Already Battered
dailyNews.description: U.S. and Israeli attacks on power plants and other civilian infrastructure risk escalating the conflict across the region, and angering Iranians who oppose the government.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration to Pay $1 Billion to Energy Giant to Cancel Wind Farms
dailyNews.description: In exchange, the French company TotalEnergies would invest in oil and natural gas projects in Texas and elsewhere.

dailyNews.title: Trump Is Digging Up Washington. Can Lawsuits Stop the Bulldozers?
dailyNews.description: As the president develops plans to fundamentally alter the White House, the Kennedy Center and other sites, federal lawsuits are beginning to catch up.

dailyNews.title: 3/23: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," National Security Adviser Mike Waltz and Senate Homeland Security chair Rand Paul join as the backlash grows against the Trump administration for the deportation of alleged Venezuelan gang members. Plus. House intelligence committee member Democratic Rep. Jim Himes joins.
